label: Cyber & Information Security
description: Threats involving systems, identities, networks, data, and cyber resilience across digital operations.
assessmentPrompt: Frame the event, attack path, affected assets, exposure conditions, and direct business impact.

label: Technology & Service Delivery
description: Outages, failed change, brittle architecture, dependency gaps, and service management issues affecting technology operations.
assessmentPrompt: Focus on service criticality, failure mode, customer or operational interruption, and recovery complexity.

label: Data & AI
description: Risks from model failure, poor data quality, privacy misuse, AI governance breakdown, and automated decision harm.
assessmentPrompt: Describe the model or data process, failure conditions, affected stakeholders, and oversight weaknesses.

label: Third-Party & Supply Chain
description: Dependency, concentration, vendor failure, sourcing weakness, and supplier misconduct affecting the enterprise.
assessmentPrompt: Capture the dependency, concentration point, disruption trigger, and knock-on business impact.

label: Financial
description: Liquidity, treasury, fraud, market, credit, valuation, and reporting exposures with direct monetary consequences.
assessmentPrompt: State the financial exposure, trigger, timing sensitivity, control breakdown, and range of monetary impact.

label: Legal
description: Contract, litigation, IP, dispute, and legal interpretation exposures that create rights, obligations, or disputes.
assessmentPrompt: Define the legal trigger, obligation or breach, counterparties involved, and expected litigation or settlement path.

label: Compliance & Regulatory
description: Breaches of laws, regulations, standards, policies, licensing obligations, or supervisory expectations.
assessmentPrompt: Map the requirement, breach mechanism, oversight gap, timing, and enforcement consequences.

label: Operational & Process
description: Human error, control breakdown, poor execution, bottlenecks, and process design failures across the operating model.
assessmentPrompt: Explain the process step, failure mode, volume, control dependency, and resulting business disruption.

label: People & Workforce
description: Capability gaps, misconduct, retention pressure, unsafe behaviour, and workforce fragility affecting execution.
assessmentPrompt: Describe the workforce dependency, failure behaviour, management gap, and potential safety or delivery outcomes.

label: Strategic & Commercial
description: Market positioning, strategic bets, pricing, product fit, concentration, and competitive response risks.
assessmentPrompt: Frame the strategic assumption, dependency, external shift, and downside to revenue, margin, or execution.

label: ESG & Sustainability
description: Climate, environmental, social, human rights, and sustainability-reporting risks driven by enterprise actions or dependencies.
assessmentPrompt: Capture the environmental or social trigger, stakeholder impact, reporting implications, and remediation path.

label: Physical Security & Safety
description: Facility breaches, sabotage, workplace safety incidents, asset theft, and physical resilience exposures.
assessmentPrompt: Describe the site, physical threat, protective controls, affected people or assets, and escalation path.

label: Business Continuity & Crisis
description: Enterprise resilience, crisis management, continuity planning, and response coordination under severe disruption.
assessmentPrompt: Focus on disruption duration, dependency map, response readiness, alternate capacity, and leadership escalation.

label: Reputation & Stakeholder Trust
description: Trust erosion across customers, regulators, investors, employees, and partners following adverse events or poor responses.
assessmentPrompt: Capture the trigger event, audience affected, narrative trajectory, and sensitivity of key stakeholder relationships.
